title: Poor Things
logline: A woman brought back to life with an infant's brain by an eccentric surgeon embarks on a journey of self-discovery, sexual awakening, and intellectual growth across Europe, ultimately confronting her past and claiming autonomy over her own existence.
antagonistOrConflict: Societal constraints on female autonomy, patriarchal control (embodied by Duncan Wedderburn and Alfie Blessington), and Bella's own fragmented identity/past
tone: Darkly comedic, surreal, provocative, and ultimately humanistic—blending Frankenstein-esque body horror with bawdy sexual comedy and sincere emotional growth
themes: The construction of identity and selfhood
The ethics of creation and scientific experimentation
Love as possession vs. love as freedom

actBreaks.description: Bella leaves Baxter's house with Duncan Wedderburn, transitioning from sheltered captivity to the wider world and sexual awakening in Lisbon.

validation.ruling: Scene #54 is omitted (no content). Scene #51 (p28-30, 29%) ends Act 1: Max bursts in confessing love and trying to stop Bella from leaving with Duncan, but Bella tranquilizes him mid-sentence and escapes—an irreversible decision that closes her confined life and launches her into the wider world, fundamentally changing the story's direction.

actBreaks.description: Bella arrives in Paris destitute and enters the brothel, shifting from romantic adventure to survival, labor, and intellectual awakening.

validation.ruling: Scene #106 (p62, 63%) confirms Act 2 break: Swiney directs Bella to 'Room 16' as she enters sex work at the Paris brothel—a major life decision that transforms her from kept woman to independent worker, fundamentally shifting the story into its final act of self-determination and professional identity.

naturalStructure.structuralPersonality: This script follows a classic three-act Bildungsroman structure tracking Bella's evolution from infant-minded curiosity to full personhood. Act One (scenes 1-54) establishes the Gothic premise and Bella's accelerated development within Baxter's controlled environment, ending when she escapes into the world. Act Two (scenes 55-106) chronicles her sexual and emotional education through Duncan's possessive romance, the trauma of witnessing poverty in Alexandria, and her ultimate abandonment. Act Three (scenes 107-158) finds Bella achieving independence through sex work, pursuing medical education, and finally confronting both her original identity and the men who seek to control her. The structure is deceptively simple—a linear journey from London to Lisbon to Paris and back—but each location represents a stage of consciousness, making geography synonymous with psychological development.
naturalStructure.pacingNotes: The script maintains brisk pacing through its 154 scenes averaging just over one page each, creating a staccato rhythm that mirrors Bella's fragmented consciousness early on and her rapid intellectual growth later. Act One moves swiftly through domestic vignettes establishing Bella's childlike state (scenes 2-14) before accelerating toward her escape. Act Two slows during the Lisbon sexual awakening (scenes 55-73) then jolts violently at the Alexandria poverty revelation (scenes 95-102), a tonal whiplash that marks Bella's loss of innocence. Act Three's Paris brothel section (scenes 106-128) uses repetitive client encounters to show both the monotony of sex work and Bella's growing detachment and intellectualism, before the final movement (scenes 132-158) tightens dramatically around the confrontation with Alfie and resolution with Baxter.

incitingIncident.description: Bella tells Baxter she's running away with Duncan at midnight; Baxter says he'll stop her but she insists he holds her too tight and she must set herself free.

validation.ruling: Scene #47 is Duncan's seductive first meeting with Bella, but doesn't shatter her status quo or force irreversible action. Scene #50 (p27, 28%) is the true inciting incident: Bella tells Baxter she's running away with Duncan at midnight, forcing the story's central conflict into motion—her escape from confinement and journey into the world cannot be ignored or reversed.

midpoint.description: Bella runs down the hotel stairs screaming and falling; Harry catches up and covers her mouth, and she bites down on his hand.

validation.ruling: Scene #97 shows Bella fleeing down hotel stairs after witnessing poverty, but this is reactive panic. Scene #96 (p54-55, 55%) is the true midpoint: Harry shows Bella the Alexandria slum where she witnesses dead babies and desperate poverty for the first time, shattering her naive worldview and catalyzing her shift from hedonistic tourist to someone who must engage with suffering—a point of no return in her consciousness.

climax.description: Max operates on the unconscious Alfie to control his bleeding and remove the bullet while Bella brings in a goat and picks up a scalpel, expressing happiness to be in the surgery.

validation.ruling: Scene #153 is Baxter's peaceful death scene—resolution, not climax. Scene #152 (p97, 99%) is the climactic confrontation: Bella performs surgery on her abusive ex-husband Alfie, transforming him into a goat-human hybrid—the ultimate demonstration of her completed arc, applying everything she's learned to directly confront and neutralize her antagonist through scientific mastery rather than victimhood.

scenes.heading: 1 EXT LONDON BRIDGE - DAY 1
scenes.summary: A woman stands on a bridge in fog and dives off into the water below.
scenes.turningPointNote: Inciting incident — the suicide that sets the entire story in motion

scenes.heading: 2 INT BAXTER’S HOUSE DRAWING ROOM - DAY 2
scenes.summary: Bella sits at a piano and joyfully smashes the keys with her fists while Baxter, a deformed man, watches her with kind eyes and smiles.

scenes.heading: 3 INT BAXTER’S HOUSE DINING ROOM - DAY 3
scenes.summary: Baxter eats while hooked to a feeding machine; Bella grabs a kipper, tastes it, and spits it across the table; a bubble emerges from Baxter's mouth and they watch it evaporate.

scenes.heading: 4 INT BAXTER’S HOUSE HALLWAY - DAY 4
scenes.summary: Baxter puts on his coat and hat to leave; Bella runs to him with a half-dog, half-pig creature following her; he locks the door behind him as he exits.

scenes.heading: 5 INT MEDICAL SCHOOL LECTURE THEATRE LONDON DAY 5
scenes.summary: Baxter lectures medical students about organs on a tray and challenges them to reconstruct them and distinguish human from animal parts.

scenes.heading: 6 EXT MEDICAL SHOOL LONDON HALLWAY DAY 6
scenes.summary: Baxter tells Max his paper showed a conventional mind straining toward mediocrity, then offers him an assistant position and asks if he's religious.

scenes.heading: 7 EXT LONDON STREET - DAY 7
scenes.summary: A child laughs at Baxter's appearance and a woman calls him the devil's work; Max suggests growing a beard and Baxter says he'd look like a big dog in a cravat.

scenes.heading: 8 INT BAXTER’S HOUSE DINING ROOM - DAY 8
scenes.summary: Bella gleefully smashes plates and throws them at the wall; when Max arrives she leaps onto him, swats his nose causing it to bleed, then walks in circles laughing.

scenes.heading: 9 INT BAXTER’S HOUSE BELLA’S BEDROOM - DAY 9
scenes.summary: Bella wakes up in her bedroom as Prim and Max enter; Max notes the time in his notebook.

scenes.heading: 10 INT BAXTER’S HOUSE DINING ROOM - DAY 10
scenes.summary: Max takes notes while Bella eats; she opens her mouth and drops chewed kipper onto the table, then scoops it up and throws it at Max.

scenes.heading: 11 INT BAXTER’S HOUSE SURGERY - DAY 11
scenes.summary: Bella watches Baxter perform surgery on a body; she asks to cut too but he says only dead ones; she walks to cadavers and examines them, holding up a penis.

scenes.heading: 12 INT BAXTER’S HOUSE HALLWAY - DAY 12
scenes.summary: Bella rides a bike down the hallway chased by a chicken that barks like a dog while Max watches startled.

scenes.heading: 13 INT BAXTER’S HOUSE GARDEN - DAY 13
scenes.summary: Bella feeds hybrid animals while Max stares wide-eyed at them and eyes the filing cabinets stuffed with medical files.

scenes.heading: 14 INT BAXTER’S HOUSE STUDY - DAY 14
scenes.summary: Max reports Bella's progress to Baxter who dismisses him; when Max asks where she came from, Baxter tells him his job is to collect data, not ask questions.

scenes.heading: 15 INT BELLA’S BEDROOM - NIGHT 15
scenes.summary: Baxter reads Bella a bedtime story; she asks if he's her daddy and he tells her she's an orphan whose parents died in the Andes.

scenes.heading: 16 INT BAXTER’S HOUSE BELLA’S BEDROOM - DAY 16
scenes.summary: Bella looks at a map and asks Max to tell her about other places; he describes locations across Europe and she jumps excitedly at each one.

scenes.heading: 17 INT BAXTER’S HOUSE STAIRWELL - DAY 17
scenes.summary: Bella climbs stairs to a door in the roof with Max following behind her.

scenes.heading: 18 EXT BAXTER’S HOUSE THE ROOF - DAY 18
scenes.summary: Bella calmly walks onto the roof while Max nervously follows on hands and knees; he sees a scar on her head; she drops a shingle over the edge and laughs as it shatters below.

scenes.heading: 19 INT BAXTER’S HOUSE SURGERY - DAY 19
scenes.summary: Bella demands to go outside; Baxter refuses but she insists and threatens to have Max take her; she screams and throws things until Baxter reluctantly agrees.
scenes.turningPointNote: Bella's first major assertion of will — forcing Baxter to let her leave the house

scenes.heading: 20 EXT LONDON STREET - DAY 20
scenes.summary: A horse-drawn carriage with drawn curtains travels through a London street.

scenes.heading: 21 INT CARRIAGE 21
scenes.summary: Inside the carriage, Baxter warns Bella that many things outside can kill her, listing snakes, carriages, birds, earthquakes, and toxic grass seeds; she shrinks back from the window.

scenes.heading: 22 EXT LONDON PARK - DAY 22
scenes.summary: Bella runs into a deserted park and rolls in leaves; Max shows her a frog and she claps his hands together killing it, then laughs and runs away.

scenes.heading: 23 INT CARRIAGE - DAY 23
scenes.summary: Bella peeks through the carriage blinds and sees people eating ice cream; she demands to stop but Baxter refuses, saying people are scared of his face; she calls him lovely like a dog face.

scenes.heading: 24 INT BAXTER’S HOUSE BELLA’S BEDROOM - DAY 24
scenes.summary: Max carries an unconscious Bella to her room; his hand hovers over her exposed skin before he covers her; her eyes flicker open as he and Prim undress and put her to bed.

scenes.heading: 25 INT BAXTER’S HOUSE STUDY - DAY 25
scenes.summary: Max rifles through files and finds Bella's with diagrams about a baby; Baxter catches him and Max threatens to go to the police; Baxter agrees to tell him the truth.
scenes.turningPointNote: Max discovers the truth about Bella's origins — major revelation that recontextualizes everything

scenes.heading: 26 EXT LONDON BRIDGE - DAY 26
scenes.summary: A woman stands on a bridge in fog and dives off.

scenes.heading: 27 EXT LONDON RIVER - DAY 27
scenes.summary: Bella's dead body washes up on the riverbank; a burly man finds her, turns her over revealing blue lips, and throws her over his shoulder.

scenes.heading: 28 INT BAXTER’S HOUSE STUDY 28
scenes.summary: Baxter tells Max the body had no pulse but some electric current, so he could have kept her alive but didn't.

scenes.heading: 29 INT BAXTER’S HOUSE SURGERY - DAY 29
scenes.summary: The burly man delivers the body to Baxter for coins; Baxter sits and stares at the pregnant corpse, then picks up a scalpel and swiftly cuts open her belly.

scenes.heading: 30 INT BAXTER’S HOUSE STUDY 30
scenes.summary: Baxter explains he took the infant's brain and put it in the woman's body to reanimate her; Max reacts with shock; a flashback shows nighttime surgery with Prim assisting and lightning-like energy.

scenes.heading: 31 INT BAXTER’S HOUSE BELLA’S BEDROOM - DAY 31
scenes.summary: Bella sleeps fitfully, then begins touching her body and masturbating.

scenes.heading: 32 INT BAXTER’S HOUSE DINING ROOM - DAY 32
scenes.summary: Bella puts an apple between her legs and rolls it back and forth until she orgasms; she tells Mrs Prim she discovered happiness and tries to touch Prim between the legs to fix her sour face; Prim pushes her away.

scenes.heading: 33 OMITTED 33
scenes.summary: Scene omitted from script.

scenes.heading: 34 OMITTED 34
scenes.summary: Scene omitted from script.

scenes.heading: 35 INT BAXTER’S HOUSE DINING ROOM - EVENING 35
scenes.summary: Baxter explains his father removed his glands so he must make gastric juices; Bella pushes her plate off the table defiantly and exits; a bubble emerges from Baxter's stomach and Max asks if he can marry Bella.

scenes.heading: 36 INT BAXTER’S HOUSE DRAWING ROOM - DAY 36
scenes.summary: Bella tosses strawberries in the air while Max runs to catch them in his mouth; Baxter watches them and observes in voiceover that he sees them looking at each other with love.

scenes.heading: 37 INT BAXTER’S HOUSE DINING ROOM 37
scenes.summary: Max confirms he has feelings and Baxter asks if he would marry Bella.

scenes.heading: 38 INT BAXTER’S HOUSE DRAWING ROOM 38
scenes.summary: Bella asks Max to take her out, then suddenly licks his ear; he's affected by it; she asks him to lick hers and he reluctantly does.

scenes.heading: 39 INT BAXTER’S HOUSE DINING ROOM 39
scenes.summary: Max asks if Baxter is raising Bella as his mistress; Baxter explains he's a eunuch who can't have sex and his father removed his capacity for love, so Max should marry her.

scenes.heading: 40 EXT BAXTER’S HOUSE GARDEN - DAY 40
scenes.summary: Max proposes marriage to Bella in the garden; when he tries to kiss her he hits her teeth; she suggests they touch each other's genitals but he refuses, saying he won't take advantage.
scenes.turningPointNote: Max proposes marriage — establishing the arrangement that will be disrupted by Duncan

scenes.heading: 41 INT BAXTER’S HOUSE DINING ROOM 41
scenes.summary: Baxter tells Max he has two conditions for the marriage: Bella must desire it and they must live with him always under a legal agreement.

scenes.heading: 42 OMITTED 42
scenes.summary: Scene omitted from script.

scenes.heading: 43 OMITTED 43
scenes.summary: Scene omitted from script.

scenes.heading: 44 INT BAXTER’S HOUSE BELLA’S BEDROOM - DAY 44
scenes.summary: Bella notices new locks on her bedroom windows, punches the window, growls, and hits it again.

scenes.heading: 45 INT BAXTER’S STUDY - DAY 45
scenes.summary: Duncan reviews the marriage contract in Baxter's study and comments it must be quite a woman; he asks to use the facilities and Baxter sarcastically asks if he's five years old.

scenes.heading: 46 INT BAXTER’S HOUSE HALLWAY - DAY 46
scenes.summary: Duncan runs up the stairs opening doors and snooping until he finds one that opens onto Bella's bedroom.

scenes.heading: 47 INT BAXTER’S HOUSE BELLA’S BEDROOM - DAY 47
scenes.summary: Duncan finds Bella blowing bubbles in a cupboard; he pops them and introduces himself; she offers him her hat and he puts it on; she tells him she's engaged to Max but Duncan says Max is dull and she should run away with him instead.
scenes.turningPointNote: Duncan meets Bella and plants the idea of escape — the catalyst for her departure

scenes.heading: 48 INT BAXTER’S HOUSE BELLA’S BEDROOM - NIGHT 48
scenes.summary: Bella masturbates in bed when Duncan knocks on her balcony door; she opens it and he reveals he climbed up; he startles her with a limp wrist trick and she laughs.

scenes.heading: 49 EXT BAXTER’S HOUSE ROOFTOP - NIGHT 49
scenes.summary: On the rooftop, Bella asks if Duncan watched her masturbating; he says he doesn't care for polite society; she says God doesn't believe in souls; Duncan calls her a prisoner and says he'll free her, offering to show her the world.

scenes.heading: 50 INT BAXTER’S HOUSE SURGERY - DAY 50
scenes.summary: Bella tells Baxter she's running away with Duncan at midnight; Baxter says he'll stop her but she insists he holds her too tight and she must set herself free.
scenes.turningPointNote: Bella announces her escape plan — the break from Baxter's control that launches Act 2

scenes.heading: 51 INT BAXTER’S HOUSE BELLA’S BEDROOM - DAY 51
scenes.summary: Max bursts in to stop Bella from leaving with Duncan, confessing his love and attempting to physically confront Duncan, but Bella tranquilizes him mid-sentence.
scenes.turningPointNote: Bella chooses Duncan over Max and her engagement, departing Baxter's house to pursue sexual freedom and adventure

scenes.heading: 52 INT BAXTER’S HOUSE BELLA’S BEDROOM - DAY 52
scenes.summary: Max wakes up with a hybrid chicken-pig creature pecking at his chest and runs downstairs.

scenes.heading: 53 INT BAXTER’S HOUSE DRAWING ROOM - DAY 53
scenes.summary: Max finds Baxter drunk on the floor drinking port for breakfast; Baxter explains he let Bella go because she has free will, and they lie together drinking.

scenes.heading: 54 OMITTED 54
scenes.summary: Scene omitted.

scenes.heading: 55 INT LISBON HOTEL ROOM - DAY 55
scenes.summary: Bella has a loud, noisy orgasm while on top of Duncan in a darkened Lisbon hotel room.

scenes.heading: 56 INT LISBON OYSTER RESTAURANT - DAY 56
scenes.summary: Duncan boasts about his sexual conquests while expertly shucking oysters for Bella at a restaurant, teaching her how to eat them.

scenes.heading: 57 EXT LISBON STREET CAFE - DAY 57
scenes.summary: Duncan teaches Bella to eat Portuguese tarts with gusto at a street cafe, insisting they must not have more despite her enthusiasm.

scenes.heading: 58 INT LISBON HOTEL ROOM - DAY 58
scenes.summary: Bella and Duncan have sex in multiple positions while a bird flies through the room; afterward, Bella asks why people don't do this all the time.

scenes.heading: 59 EXT LISBON STREET - DAY 59
scenes.summary: Bella stands anxiously at the hotel door, then ventures out alone onto the street toward the bakery, excited by her independence.

scenes.heading: 60 EXT LISBON STREET CAFE - DAY 60
scenes.summary: Bella gorges on five Portuguese tarts at the cafe, eating them whole with custard covering her face while fancy people stare.

scenes.heading: 61 EXT LISBON STREET - DAY 61
scenes.summary: Bella follows music to a balcony, witnesses a couple fighting, gets screamed at, runs into a maze of streets, becomes lost, watches fishermen fight, vomits her tarts, and realizes she's completely disoriented in the city.

scenes.heading: 62 INT LISBON HOTEL ROOM - EVENING 62
scenes.summary: Duncan confronts Bella about disappearing; she explains her adventure getting lost and finding her way back by following the tram sound, dismissing his concern.

scenes.heading: 63 INT LISBON HOTEL RESTAURANT - NIGHT 63
scenes.summary: At dinner with another couple, Bella spits revolting food back onto her plate and tells a crying baby to shut up, embarrassing Duncan in front of his friends.

scenes.heading: 64 INT LISBON RESTAURANT HALLWAY - NIGHT 64
scenes.summary: Duncan pushes Bella against the wall and twists her wrist painfully, demanding she behave and confine herself to three acceptable phrases at dinner.

scenes.heading: 65 INT LISBON RESTAURANT - NIGHT 65
scenes.summary: Bella robotically uses Duncan's prescribed phrases at the table, saying 'How wonderful' when told someone's father is dying.

scenes.heading: 66 INT BAXTER’S HOUSE DINING ROOM - DAY 66
scenes.summary: Max and Baxter receive a postcard from Bella with naive sexual drawings and scrawled writing about Lisbon, which they struggle to decipher together.

scenes.heading: 67 OMITTED 67
scenes.summary: Scene omitted.

scenes.heading: 68 OMITTED 68
scenes.summary: Scene omitted.

scenes.heading: 69 INT LISBON BAR - DAY 69
scenes.summary: Bella enters a bar and tosses back multiple shots of alcohol.

scenes.heading: 70 INT LISBON BAR - NIGHT 70
scenes.summary: Bella wakes up slouched in a corner of the bar surrounded by empty glasses.

scenes.heading: 71 INT LISBON HOTEL LOBBY - NIGHT 71
scenes.summary: A distressed Duncan sits in the hotel lobby when Bella arrives; a duchess mistakes Bella for Victoria Blessington, which Bella denies.

scenes.heading: 72 INT LISBON RESTAURANT - NIGHT 72
scenes.summary: Bella orders multiple courses at dinner while Duncan sulks; she confronts him about contradicting his own advice to discover by whim, and he realizes he's become the clingy lover he once despised.

scenes.heading: 73 INT LISBON HOTEL ROOM - NIGHT 73
scenes.summary: Duncan discovers the words 'soft' and 'softer' written on Bella's inner thighs; she explains a man tested whether her skin was the softest he'd ever touched and confirmed it was.

scenes.heading: 74 INT LISBON HOTEL BAR - NIGHT 74
scenes.summary: Duncan smashes his head into the bar counter until it bleeds, then demands to know if Bella had sex with the man; she explains he only performed oral sex on her at her request.

scenes.heading: 75 INT LONDON MEDICAL SCHOOL - DAY 75
scenes.summary: Baxter passes out during a cadaver demonstration after accidentally inhaling too much chloroform from goats.

scenes.heading: 76 INT LONDON MEDICAL SCHOOL - DAY 76
scenes.summary: Max suggests Baxter is upset about Bella's absence; Baxter denies it violently, swinging at passing students and insisting he must move on to the next project.

scenes.heading: 77 INT LISBON HOTEL ROOM - DAY 77
scenes.summary: Duncan tells Bella he has a surprise to support her adventurous spirit and points to a large chest, ordering her to get in.

scenes.heading: 78 OMITTED 78
scenes.summary: Scene omitted.

scenes.heading: 79 EXT LISBON PATH - DAY 79
scenes.summary: Bella knocks on the trunk from inside, saying she needs to urinate.

scenes.heading: 80 INT CABIN - DAY 80
scenes.summary: Bella emerges from the trunk to discover Duncan has transported her onto a ship at sea, trapping her away from land; she immediately recognizes his intent to control her movements.
scenes.turningPointNote: Duncan kidnaps Bella by tricking her into a trunk and taking her to sea, escalating his possessive control and removing her freedom to explore

scenes.heading: 81 INT SHIP BATHROOM - DAY 81
scenes.summary: Bella locks herself in the tiny bathroom staring out the porthole at endless blue sea while Duncan bangs on the door.

scenes.heading: 82 INT CABIN - NIGHT 82
scenes.summary: Bella emerges from the bathroom to find Duncan asleep and goes to the cabin door.

scenes.heading: 83 EXT SHIP - NIGHT 83
scenes.summary: Bella explores the empty ship at night and witnesses a steward violently smashing a seabird against the railing to kill it for defecating on him; she learns they won't stop until Athens in three days.

scenes.heading: 84 INT DINING ROOM - DAY 84
scenes.summary: Duncan tries to apologize for kidnapping Bella and asks if she loves him; she questions how to empirically judge love while drawing a postcard, and he becomes frustrated by her contradictory knowledge, eventually calling her a bitch.

scenes.heading: 85 INT SHIP HALLWAY - DAY 85
scenes.summary: Duncan suddenly pushes Bella against the wall in the hallway and proposes marriage, becoming agitated when she reveals she's already engaged to Max.

scenes.heading: 86 EXT LONDON PARK - DAY 86
scenes.summary: Max throws a ball at Felicity, a childlike young woman, hitting her in the head twice; Baxter observes her slow progress and she sobs uncontrollably.

scenes.heading: 87 EXT SHIP DECK - DAY 87
scenes.summary: Bella reads Emerson with Martha and Harry on deck, discussing philosophy; Harry argues people are cruel beasts who can't improve, while Bella and Martha believe in progress through philosophy.

scenes.heading: 88 INT SHIP CARDS TABLE ROOM - NIGHT 88
scenes.summary: Bella tries to get Duncan to come with her, but he's distracted losing heavily at cards and drinking.

scenes.heading: 89 INT CABIN - NIGHT 89
scenes.summary: Duncan kisses Bella's feet while she reads; she pushes him away to meet Martha, and he threatens to throw Martha overboard, which Bella dares him to do.

scenes.heading: 90 EXT SHIP DECK - DAY 90
scenes.summary: Duncan attempts to throw Martha overboard in her deck chair; Harry and two stewards restrain him while Martha hits him in the throat with her cane, and Bella watches from the doorway.

scenes.heading: 91 INT CABIN - NIGHT 91
scenes.summary: Duncan sleeps battered and bruised while Bella lies awake beside him unable to sleep.

scenes.heading: 92 INT/EXT HARRY’S CABIN - NIGHT 92
scenes.summary: Bella knocks on Harry's door at night, explaining Duncan makes cruelty bubble up in her and she wants to improve herself; Harry says she fears the world she doesn't know.

scenes.heading: 93 EXT. SEA - DAY 93
scenes.summary: The ship approaches Alexandria.

scenes.heading: 94 INT SHIP HALLWAY - DAY 94
scenes.summary: Bella and Harry walk past the casino where Duncan is playing cards.

scenes.heading: 95 EXT ALEXANDRIA LIGHTHOUSE TO HOTEL - DAY 95
scenes.summary: Bella and Harry travel in a cable car to the hotel.

scenes.heading: 97 INT ALEXANDRIA HOTEL - DAY 97
scenes.summary: Bella hears distant wailing from the hotel balcony; Harry leads her to peer over the wall where she sees a sprawling slum of impoverished desperate people, dead babies, and squalor below.
scenes.turningPointNote: Bella's first encounter with extreme poverty and human suffering shatters her sheltered worldview, catalyzing her moral awakening

scenes.heading: 98 INT ALEXANDRIA HOTEL STAIRS - DAY 98
scenes.summary: Bella runs down the hotel stairs screaming and falling; Harry catches up and covers her mouth, and she bites down on his hand.

scenes.heading: 99 EXT SHIP HALLWAY - DAY 99
scenes.summary: Bella walks shellshocked along the ship hallway.

scenes.heading: 100 INT CABIN - NIGHT 100 100
scenes.summary: Bella wakes to find Duncan passed out drunk covered in whisky and gambling winnings; she gathers all the money into a bag and leaves.

scenes.heading: 101 EXT SHIP - NIGHT 101 101
scenes.summary: Bella tries to leave the ship to give Duncan's money to the poor in the slum, but two stewards offer to take care of it for her; she thanks them and returns to the ship while they smile at each other.
scenes.turningPointNote: Bella's naive attempt at charity is exploited by the stewards who will clearly steal the money, marking her first direct betrayal by the world's cruelty

scenes.heading: 102 INT CABIN HALLWAY - NIGHT 102 102
scenes.summary: Bella confronts Duncan in their ransacked cabin and reveals she took his gambling winnings, explaining she is exhausted by the suffering she has witnessed.
scenes.turningPointNote: Bella's theft and emotional collapse marks her disillusionment with Duncan and the beginning of her separation from him

scenes.heading: 103 INT BAXTER’S DINING ROOM - DAY 103 103
scenes.summary: Baxter reads Bella's incoherent letter describing dead babies and blood, recognizing she is emotionally devastated.

scenes.heading: 104 EXT SHIP DECK - DAY 104 104
scenes.summary: Harry apologizes to Bella for hurting her hand, admitting he wanted to hurt her out of resentment for her happiness, but Bella insists she wants to improve the world despite Harry's nihilism.

scenes.heading: 106 EXT A SQUARE IN PARIS - DAY 106 106
scenes.summary: Bella and Duncan sit penniless on a park bench in Paris as Duncan panics and Bella treats their poverty as an interesting experiment.

scenes.heading: 107 EXT SQUARE PARIS - DAY 107 107
scenes.summary: Bella encounters Madame Swiney outside a brothel who offers her work as a prostitute, and after initial confusion Bella agrees to go upstairs with a client.
scenes.turningPointNote: Bella decides to become a sex worker, fundamentally changing her relationship to her body and autonomy

scenes.heading: 108 INT. PARIS BROTHEL FOYER - DAY 108 108
scenes.summary: Swiney directs Bella to room 16.

scenes.heading: 109 INT HOTEL ROOM PARIS - DAY 109 109
scenes.summary: Bella has brief, painful sex with her first client who finishes in three thrusts, and she stifles a laugh at his performance.

scenes.heading: 110 INT PARK PARIS - DAY 110 110
scenes.summary: Bella returns to Duncan with a chocolate eclair and tells him she had sex for money, comparing the client unfavorably to Duncan and proposing this work will help their relationship.

scenes.heading: 111 INT PARIS BROTHEL FOYER - DAY 111 111
scenes.summary: Bella formally requests employment from Madame Swiney, explaining she needs sex and money and prefers brief transactions to the demands of a kept lover, and Swiney introduces her to the other women.

scenes.heading: 112 INT PARIS BROTHEL BEDROOM - DAY 112 112
scenes.summary: Bella has sex with a foul-smelling client who finishes quickly, and Toinette brings her lavender-scented handkerchief and tea to help with the experience.

scenes.heading: 113 INT PARIS BROTHEL FOYER - NIGHT 113 113
scenes.summary: Bella objects to Swiney's lineup system where she must accept any client regardless of whether she finds him distasteful, but a client interrupts and selects her.

scenes.heading: 114 INT SWINEY’S OFFICE - NIGHT 114 114
scenes.summary: Swiney bites Bella's ear until it bleeds while discussing beauty and aging, then explains some men enjoy that the women don't like it, and Bella realizes she must accept the world's demands.

scenes.heading: 115 INT PARIS BROTHEL BEDROOM - DAY 115 115
scenes.summary: Bella introduces a quiz system with her client involving childhood memories, jokes, and hygiene checks to enhance their experience.

scenes.heading: 116 INT PARIS BROTHEL FOYER 116 116
scenes.summary: A man with hooks for hands selects Bella from the lineup.

scenes.heading: 117 INT PARIS MEDICAL SCHOOL - DAY 117 117
scenes.summary: Bella and Toinette sneak into the back of a medical school lecture where a surgeon dissects a body.

scenes.heading: 118 INT PARIS MEDICAL SCHOOL - DAY 118 118
scenes.summary: Bella and Toinette eat croissants while examining the dissected body in the empty lecture hall, and Bella criticizes the surgeon's technique.

scenes.heading: 119 INT PARIS BROTHEL BEDROOM - NIGHT 119 119
scenes.summary: Bella hangs suspended from the ceiling with a bit in her mouth while a man humps her leg.

scenes.heading: 120 INT PARIS BROTHEL ROOM - DAY 120 120
scenes.summary: A father brings his two teenage sons to Bella for sexual education and demonstrates techniques on her while instructing them.

scenes.heading: 121 EXT PARIS MULTIPLE VIEWS SQUARE - DAY 121 121
scenes.summary: Bella tells Toinette she is discovering unknown parts of herself through sex work when Duncan appears disheveled and announces he has forgiven her and booked passage home.

scenes.heading: 122 INT BAXTER’S STAIRWAY - DAY 122 122
scenes.summary: Felicity finger paints on walls while Max takes notes on her slow language development, and Baxter coldly compares her to the chicken-dog, explaining he must remain emotionally detached for science.

scenes.heading: 123 INT BAXTER’S HOUSE SURGERY - DAY 123 123
scenes.summary: Max operates on Baxter's tumor while Baxter watches in a mirror and realizes the cancer has spread with visible polyps, announcing he is dying.
scenes.turningPointNote: Baxter discovers his cancer is terminal, setting a deadline for Bella's return and the resolution of their relationship

scenes.heading: 124 INT PARIS BROTHEL BEDROOM - NIGHT 124 124
scenes.summary: Bella tells Swiney she feels almost nothing and her empathy has turned to contemptuous rage, and Swiney celebrates this as fabulous progress.

scenes.heading: 125 INT PARIS BROTHEL BEDROOM - DAY 125 125
scenes.summary: Toinette performs oral sex on Bella, then points to Bella's abdominal scar and reveals she also has a baby scar, but Bella insists hers is from an accident.

scenes.heading: 126 INT BAXTER’S HOUSE HALLWAY / STUDY - DAY 126 126
scenes.summary: Max receives a thick letter with mad writing from Wedderburn and finds Baxter unconscious and hooked up to a blood-pumping machine.

scenes.heading: 127 INT ASYLUM - DAY 127 127
scenes.summary: Max visits Duncan in an asylum cell where Duncan rants that Baxter unleashed a demon in Bella's body, and Max notices bloody scratches all over Duncan's ankle.

scenes.heading: 128 INT PARIS BROTHEL BEDROOM - DAY 128 128
scenes.summary: Bella receives a postcard from London showing Baxter on his deathbed surrounded by medical devices with the message to come.
scenes.turningPointNote: Bella learns Baxter is dying and decides to return to London

scenes.heading: 129 OMITTED 129 129
scenes.summary: Bella arrives at Baxter's house and Prim calls her a whore before walking away.

scenes.heading: 132 INT BAXTER’S HOUSE DRAWING ROOM - DAY 132 132
scenes.summary: Bella rushes to embrace the dying Baxter who is hooked up to oxygen and blood machines, and he tells her he missed her before lying back down exhausted.

scenes.heading: 133 INT BAXTER’S HOUSE OPERATING THEATER - DAY 133 133
scenes.summary: Bella discovers Baxter's operation notes about her and confronts Max for not telling her, and Max admits he was too cowardly and wanted to be with her.
scenes.turningPointNote: Bella learns the full truth about her creation and examines her surgical scar

scenes.heading: 134 INT BAXTER’S HOUSE DINING ROOM (MEAL PREPARATION AREA) - DAY 134 134
scenes.summary: Bella meets Felicity who is hammering steak and chanting insults at her, then Felicity smashes Prim's hand with the hammer when Prim tries to take the meat.

scenes.heading: 135 EXT LONDON STREET - DAY 135 135
scenes.summary: Bella walks through a London street.

scenes.heading: 136 EXT LONDON BRIDGE - DAY 136 136
scenes.summary: Bella walks onto London Bridge and sees dead fish on the bank below.

scenes.heading: 137 INT BAXTER’S HOUSE DRAWING ROOM - NIGHT 137 137
scenes.summary: Bella confronts the dying Baxter about wanting to hit him for what he did, and he asks if she'd rather be a dead fish, then confirms she had a fish hook in her nose and explains neither she nor Felicity are his creations.

scenes.heading: 138 EXT LONDON PARK - DAY 138 138
scenes.summary: Bella and Max walk in a park discussing Baxter's impending death and their betrothal, and Max says he's still mesmerized by her and doesn't judge her sex work, only feeling jealous of the men's time with her.

scenes.heading: 139 INT LONDON CHURCH - DAY 139 139
scenes.summary: Bella walks down the aisle with the drugged Baxter when Alfie Blessington storms into the church and calls her Victoria, claiming she is his wife.
scenes.turningPointNote: Alfie's arrival interrupts Bella's wedding and reveals her previous identity as Victoria, his wife

scenes.heading: 140 OMITTED 140 140
scenes.summary: This scene number is marked as omitted in the script.

scenes.heading: 141 INT CARRIAGE - DAY 141 141
scenes.summary: Bella sits awkwardly in a carriage with Alfie who pats her hand and says it's good to have her back as Victoria.

scenes.heading: 142 EXT ALFIE’S HOUSE GATES - DAY 142 142
scenes.summary: The carriage enters through gates that close and bolt behind Bella as she looks up at Alfie's mansion.

scenes.heading: 143 EXT ALFIE’S HOUSE DRIVEWAY - DAY 143 143
scenes.summary: Alfie pulls out a pistol claiming the servants are planning an uprising, and the disheveled butler and injured maid react with fear and recognition when they see Bella.

scenes.heading: 144 INT ALFIE’S HOUSE HALLWAY - DAY 144 144
scenes.summary: Bella asks the maid Allison to tell her about herself and whether she was nice, and Allison barks a bitter laugh in response.

scenes.heading: 145 INT ALFIE’S HOUSE BELLA’S BEDROOM - DAY 145 145
scenes.summary: Bella examines her old bedroom and finds a writing pad with the word fuck written forty times.

scenes.heading: 146 INT ALFIE’S HOUSE DINING ROOM - NIGHT 146 146
scenes.summary: Alfie and Bella dine together as he reveals Victoria hated their baby and called it a monster, then he commands his doberman to attack the maid bringing soup.

scenes.heading: 147 OMITTED 147 147
scenes.summary: This scene number is marked as omitted in the script.

scenes.heading: 148 OMITTED 148 148
scenes.summary: This scene number is marked as omitted in the script.

scenes.heading: 149 OMITTED 149 149
scenes.summary: This scene number is marked as omitted in the script.

scenes.heading: 150 EXT ALFIE’S HOUSE GATES - DAY 150 150
scenes.summary: Bella tries the locked gate in the morning and realizes the high walls make her trapped in Alfie's estate.

scenes.heading: 151 INT ALFIE’S HOUSE DINNING ROOM - DAY 151 151
scenes.summary: Bella overhears Alfie discussing with a doctor the surgical removal of her clitoris using a specialized device, with Alfie ordering the complete removal to calm her.
scenes.turningPointNote: Bella discovers Alfie's plan to mutilate her genitals, escalating the threat to her bodily autonomy to its highest point

scenes.heading: 152 INT ALFIE’S HOUSE BELLA’S BEDROOM - DAY 152 152
scenes.summary: Bella sits in her room staring at the pad with fuck written repeatedly as Alfie calls for her.

scenes.heading: 153 INT ALFIE’S DINING ROOM - DAY 153 153
scenes.summary: Bella tells Alfie she wants to leave to see her dying God, but Alfie declares she is his territory and announces he will have her clitoris removed and impregnate her to end her sexual distractions.

scenes.heading: 154 OMITTED 154 154
scenes.summary: This scene number is marked as omitted in the script.

scenes.heading: 155 INT BAXTER’S FOYER - DAY 155 155
scenes.summary: Alfie lies bleeding in the foyer while Bella, Max, and Prim decide to take him to surgery despite Max warning that Alfie won't stop if he survives, and Bella agrees he needs improvement.

scenes.heading: 156 INT BAXTER’S HOUSE SURGERY - DAY 156 156
scenes.summary: Max operates on the unconscious Alfie to control his bleeding and remove the bullet while Bella brings in a goat and picks up a scalpel, expressing happiness to be in the surgery.

scenes.heading: 157 INT BAXTER’S HOUSE DRAWING ROOM - NIGHT 157 157
scenes.summary: Bella lies beside the dying Baxter on the sofa as he tells her that unlike others who looked at him with horror and pity, she looks at him with love, and he kisses her head.
scenes.turningPointNote: Baxter's death scene — emotional climax of Bella's relationship with her creator/father figure, marking the end of his arc and her full independence

scenes.heading: 158 EXT BAXTER’S HOUSE GARDEN - DAY 158 158
scenes.summary: In the garden, Bella nervously prepares for her anatomy exam while Max reassures her, and Alfie—now transformed—grazes on all fours on the lawn eating grass and bleating like a goat.
scenes.turningPointNote: Resolution revealing Alfie's fate as a goat-brained creature and Bella's new life as a medical student surrounded by her chosen family — final transformation of antagonist and protagonist's triumph
